hypothesis: Peeling the public final AES linear layer exposes chosen one-bit differential structure at round 3 for all 128 input bits; identity R3, both R4 representations, and semantically peeled AES-10 are null calibrations.
peeling_semantics: InvMixColumns then InvShiftRows for rounds 1-9; InvShiftRows only for AES-10, whose final round has no MixColumns.
decision_rule: Peeled R3 requires positive effects for all 128 bits and BH q <= 0.01 within its pre-specified 128-bit family. Global BH across all six families is also reported but is not the pre-registered decision statistic. Other families are null calibrations.
